# @pautena/react-design-system

AI-ready design system built on shadcn/ui with MCP support

## shadcn

### Introduction

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/shadcn-introduction--docs)

## Inputs

### Autocomplete

Autocomplete component that wraps the MUI Autocomplete component with additional props. Supports extensive customization through slots and slotProps.

**Example:**

```tsx
// Basic usage
<Autocomplete
  label="Country"
  options={countries}
  onChangeValue={handleChange}
/>

// With slot customization
<Autocomplete
  label="Country"
  options={countries}
  slots={{
    textField: CustomTextField
  }}
  slotProps={{
    autocomplete: { size: "small" },
    textField: { variant: "filled" }
  }}
/>
```

**Props:**
- `autocomplete`: `Partial<
    Omit<MuiAutocompleteProps<any, any, any, any>, "onChange" | "renderInput">
  >` - Props for the autocomplete component (onChange is managed by the component)
- `textField`: `Partial<TextFieldProps>` - Props for the text field

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--default)
- [Helper Text](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--helper-text)
- [Loading](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--loading)
- [Loading With Value](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--loading-with-value)
- [Fetching](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--fetching)
- [Loading And Fetching](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--loading-and-fetching)
- [Size Small](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--size-small)
- [Size Small Loading](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--size-small-loading)
- [Size Small Fetching](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--size-small-fetching)
- [With Background](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--with-background)
- [With Slot Props Customization](./?path=/story/inputs-autocomplete--with-slot-props-customization)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-autocomplete--docs)

### DateRangeCalendar

A Date Range Calendar component that allows users to select a range of dates.

**Props:**
- `defaultValue`: `DateRange` (required) - The default date range value.

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/inputs-daterangecalendar--default)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-daterangecalendar--docs)

### DateRangePicker

DateRangePicker component allows users to select a date range.

**Props:**
- `label`: `string` (required) - The label for the date range picker.
- `defaultValue`: `DateRange` (required) - The default value for the date range picker.
- `format`: `string` (required) - The format in which the date range should be displayed.

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/inputs-daterangepicker--default)
- [Small](./?path=/story/inputs-daterangepicker--small)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-daterangepicker--docs)

### Select

A custom Select component that extends the functionality of the Material-UI Select component. This component supports additional features such as loading and fetching states, custom colors, and full-width display. Supports extensive customization through slots and slotProps.

**Example:**

```tsx
// Basic usage
<Select label="Country" value={country} onChange={handleChange}>
  <MenuItem value="us">United States</MenuItem>
  <MenuItem value="uk">United Kingdom</MenuItem>
</Select>

// With custom loading indicator
<Select
  label="Status"
  value={status}
  loading
  slotProps={{
    loadingIndicator: { size: 24 }
  }}
/>
```

**Props:**
- `formControl`: `Partial<FormControlProps>` - Props for the form control
- `inputLabel`: `Partial<InputLabelProps>` - Props for the input label
- `select`: `Partial<Omit<MuiSelectProps<any>, "onChange">>` - Props for the select (onChange is managed by the component)
- `renderValueContainer`: `Partial<BoxProps>` - Props for the render value container
- `loadingIndicator`: `Partial<CircularProgressProps>` - Props for the loading indicator
- `fetchingIndicator`: `Partial<LinearProgressProps>` - Props for the fetching indicator

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/inputs-select--default)
- [Without Full Width](./?path=/story/inputs-select--without-full-width)
- [Select Loaded](./?path=/story/inputs-select--select-loaded)
- [Loading](./?path=/story/inputs-select--loading)
- [Fetching](./?path=/story/inputs-select--fetching)
- [Size Small](./?path=/story/inputs-select--size-small)
- [With Background](./?path=/story/inputs-select--with-background)
- [With Slot Props Customization](./?path=/story/inputs-select--with-slot-props-customization)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-select--docs)

### TextField

A customizable TextField component that extends the functionality of the Material-UI TextField component and supports various props for styling and functionality. Supports extensive customization through slots and slotProps.

**Example:**

```tsx
// Basic usage
<TextField label="Email" />

// With loading state
<TextField label="Search" loading />

// Custom loading indicator size
<TextField
  label="Username"
  loading
  slotProps={{
    loadingIndicator: { size: 24 }
  }}
/>
```

**Props:**
- `formControl`: `Partial<FormControlProps>` - Props for the form control
- `inputLabel`: `Partial<MuiInputLabelProps>` - Props for the input label
- `input`: `Partial<OutlinedInputProps>` - Props for the input
- `inputAdornment`: `Partial<InputAdornmentProps>` - Props for the input adornment
- `loadingIndicator`: `Partial<CircularProgressProps>` - Props for the loading indicator
- `fetchingIndicator`: `Partial<LinearProgressProps>` - Props for the fetching indicator
- `helperText`: `Partial<FormHelperTextProps>` - Props for the helper text

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--default)
- [Helper Text](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--helper-text)
- [Loading](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--loading)
- [Loading With Value](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--loading-with-value)
- [Fetching](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--fetching)
- [Loading And Fetching](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--loading-and-fetching)
- [Fetching With End Adornment](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--fetching-with-end-adornment)
- [Size Small](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--size-small)
- [Size Small Fetching](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--size-small-fetching)
- [Disabled](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--disabled)
- [Size Small Loading](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--size-small-loading)
- [With Background](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--with-background)
- [With Slot Props Customization](./?path=/story/inputs-textfield--with-slot-props-customization)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-textfield--docs)

## Dialogs

### BootstrapDialog

A customizable dialog component. Use it as a base to create more dialogs Supports extensive customization through slots and slotProps. Each internal element can be customized or replaced.

**Example:**

```tsx
// Basic usage
<BootstrapDialog
  open={true}
  title="Confirm Action"
  onClose={handleClose}
  acceptable
  cancelable
>
  Are you sure?
</BootstrapDialog>

// Custom close button
<BootstrapDialog
  title="Settings"
  slotProps={{
    closeButton: { color: 'error' }
  }}
/>
```

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--default)
- [Acceptable And Cancelable](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--acceptable-and-cancelable)
- [With Extra Actions](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--with-extra-actions)
- [Loading With Acceptable](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--loading-with-acceptable)
- [Loading](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--loading)
- [Disabled](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--disabled)
- [Custom Texts](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--custom-texts)
- [With Slot Props Customization](./?path=/story/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--with-slot-props-customization)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/dialogs-bootstrapdialog--docs)

### ConfirmDialog

ConfirmDialog component renders a dialog to ask a user to confirm an action with customizable title, confirmation and cancellation actions. It optionally requires a passphrase to enable the confirmation action.

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/dialogs-confirmdialog--default)
- [Loading](./?path=/story/dialogs-confirmdialog--loading)
- [Disabled](./?path=/story/dialogs-confirmdialog--disabled)
- [Custom Button Text](./?path=/story/dialogs-confirmdialog--custom-button-text)
- [Passphrase](./?path=/story/dialogs-confirmdialog--passphrase)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/dialogs-confirmdialog--docs)

### FormDialog

A generic form dialog component that wraps a BootstrapDialog and handles form submission. Put your form inside and receive the data validated using the input name field.

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/dialogs-formdialog--default)
- [Loading](./?path=/story/dialogs-formdialog--loading)
- [Disabled](./?path=/story/dialogs-formdialog--disabled)
- [Custom Button Text](./?path=/story/dialogs-formdialog--custom-button-text)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/dialogs-formdialog--docs)

## Containers

### Content

A functional component that renders its children inside a main container.

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/containers-content--default)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/containers-content--docs)

### ListPanel

ListPanel component renders a panel with a list of items and a content area.

**Props:**
- `defaultSelectedItem`: `string` - The ID of the item that should be selected by default.
- `items`: `ListPanelItem[]` (required) - The list of items to be displayed in the panel.
- `listMode`: `"panel" | "navigation"` - The mode of the list, either "panel" or "navigation".
- `colBreakpoint`: `number` - The breakpoint for column layout.
- `onSelectedItemChange`: `(id: string) => void` - Callback function that is called when the selected item changes.
- `children`: `React.ReactNode` - Content to display in the panel area

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/containers-listpanel--default)
- [Long](./?path=/story/containers-listpanel--long)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/containers-listpanel--docs)

## Placeholders

### ContentPlaceholder

A component that serves as a placeholder for content, displaying a skeleton grid.

**Props:**
- `size`: `number` - Optional size of the placeholder.
- `p`: `number` - Optional padding for the placeholder.
- `children`: `React.ReactNode` - Content to display before the skeleton grid

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/placeholders-contentplaceholder--default)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/placeholders-contentplaceholder--docs)

### Placeholder

Empty state placeholder with optional icon and actions

**Props:**
- `title`: `string` (required) - Main title text
- `subtitle`: `string` (required) - Subtitle or description text
- `icon`: `PlaceholderIcon` - Custom icon render function
- `actions`: `PlaceholderAction[]` - Action buttons to display

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/placeholders-placeholder--default)
- [With Icon](./?path=/story/placeholders-placeholder--with-icon)
- [With Actions](./?path=/story/placeholders-placeholder--with-actions)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/placeholders-placeholder--docs)

### SkeletonCard

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/placeholders-skeletoncard--default)
- [Animated](./?path=/story/placeholders-skeletoncard--animated)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/placeholders-skeletoncard--docs)

### SkeletonGrid

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/placeholders-skeletongrid--default)
- [Compact](./?path=/story/placeholders-skeletongrid--compact)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/placeholders-skeletongrid--docs)

## Layouts

### DrawerLayout

**Stories:**
- [Temporary](./?path=/story/layouts-drawerlayout--temporary)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/layouts-drawerlayout--docs)

### HeaderLayout

A layout component that provides a header and content area with optional loading, fetching, and error states.

**Props:**
- `header`: `HeaderProps` - Props for the header slot.
- `content`: `ContentProps` - Props for the content slot.

**Stories:**
- [Skeleton](./?path=/story/layouts-headerlayout--skeleton)
- [Data Table](./?path=/story/layouts-headerlayout--data-table)
- [Tabs](./?path=/story/layouts-headerlayout--tabs)
- [Loading](./?path=/story/layouts-headerlayout--loading)
- [Fetching](./?path=/story/layouts-headerlayout--fetching)
- [Error](./?path=/story/layouts-headerlayout--error)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/layouts-headerlayout--docs)

## Alerts

### ExpandableAlert

Alert component with expandable metadata section

**Props:**
- `severity`: `AlertColor` (required) - Alert severity level
- `iconMapping`: `Partial<Record<AlertColor, React.ReactNode>>` - Custom icon mapping for different severity levels
- `title`: `string` - Alert title
- `message`: `string` (required) - Alert message content
- `metadata`: `string | string[]` - Additional metadata to display in expandable section
- `metadataComponent`: `ReactElement` - Custom component to render in expandable section
- `onClose`: `() => void` (required) - Callback when alert is closed
- `sx`: `SxProps<Theme>` - Custom styles

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/alerts-expandablealert--default)
- [Success](./?path=/story/alerts-expandablealert--success)
- [Error](./?path=/story/alerts-expandablealert--error)
- [Warning](./?path=/story/alerts-expandablealert--warning)
- [Wihtout Metadata](./?path=/story/alerts-expandablealert--wihtout-metadata)
- [Metadata Custom Component](./?path=/story/alerts-expandablealert--metadata-custom-component)
- [Snackbar Alert](./?path=/story/alerts-expandablealert--snackbar-alert)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/alerts-expandablealert--docs)

## Data Display

### Header

Section used to provide basic information about the page and display main actions Supports extensive customization through slots and slotProps. Each internal element (breadcrumbs, title, actions, tabs) can be customized or replaced.

**Example:**

```tsx
// Basic usage
<Header
  title="Dashboard"
  subtitle="Welcome back"
  breadcrumbs={[{id: '1', text: 'Home', link: '/'}]}
  actions={[{id: 'add', text: 'Add', onClick: handleAdd}]}
/>

// Custom breadcrumb separator
<Header
  title="Settings"
  breadcrumbs={breadcrumbs}
  slotProps={{
    breadcrumbs: { separator: '/' }
  }}
/>

// Custom action button styling
<Header
  title="Users"
  actions={actions}
  slotProps={{
    actionButton: { size: 'large', variant: 'contained' }
  }}
/>
```

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/data-display-header--default)
- [Only Title](./?path=/story/data-display-header--only-title)
- [Custom Title](./?path=/story/data-display-header--custom-title)
- [Title Loading](./?path=/story/data-display-header--title-loading)
- [Custom Subtitle](./?path=/story/data-display-header--custom-subtitle)
- [Subtitle Loading](./?path=/story/data-display-header--subtitle-loading)
- [Color Inherit](./?path=/story/data-display-header--color-inherit)
- [Color Primary](./?path=/story/data-display-header--color-primary)
- [Color Secondary](./?path=/story/data-display-header--color-secondary)
- [Color Default](./?path=/story/data-display-header--color-default)
- [Color Transparent](./?path=/story/data-display-header--color-transparent)
- [With Subheader](./?path=/story/data-display-header--with-subheader)
- [With Breadcumbs](./?path=/story/data-display-header--with-breadcumbs)
- [With Actions](./?path=/story/data-display-header--with-actions)
- [With Panel Tabs](./?path=/story/data-display-header--with-panel-tabs)
- [Navigation Button](./?path=/story/data-display-header--navigation-button)
- [With Border](./?path=/story/data-display-header--with-border)
- [Color Paper](./?path=/story/data-display-header--color-paper)
- [Custom Action Styles](./?path=/story/data-display-header--custom-action-styles)
- [With Slot Props Customization](./?path=/story/data-display-header--with-slot-props-customization)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/data-display-header--docs)

## Feedback

### NotificationCenter

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/feedback-notificationcenter--default)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/feedback-notificationcenter--docs)

### QueryContainer

Component to show different indicators based on the usual api query statuses

**Props:**
- `fetching`: `boolean | boolean[]` - There is a query in progress and we have available data
- `loading`: `boolean | boolean[]` - There is a query in progress and we don't have available data
- `error`: `QueryContainerError` - The query has returned an error
- `success`: `QueryContainerSuccess` - The query has finished successfully
- `children`: `React.ReactNode` - Content to display when not in loading/error/success state

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--default)
- [Fetching](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--fetching)
- [Fetching And Loading](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--fetching-and-loading)
- [Error](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--error)
- [Error With Only Message](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--error-with-only-message)
- [Success](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--success)
- [Success With Only Message](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--success-with-only-message)
- [Content](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--content)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/feedback-querycontainer--docs)

## Tables

### RemoteDataTable

A table component designed for displaying remote/server-side data with built-in pagination, sorting, and filtering capabilities. This component is fully controlled - all state (pagination, sorting, filters) must be managed by the parent component. For convenience, use the `useRemoteDataTable` hook to manage this state.

**Example:**

```tsx
const tableState = useRemoteDataTable({
  initialPagination: { pageSize: 25 }
});

<RemoteDataTable
  data={items}
  columns={columns}
  {...tableState}
  query={{
    fields: queryFields,
    filters: tableState.filters,
    onFiltersChange: tableState.onFiltersChange
  }}
/>
```

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--default)
- [Sorted By Created Date](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--sorted-by-created-date)
- [With Query Builder](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--with-query-builder)
- [Using Hook](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--using-hook)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/tables-remotedatatable--docs)
